^extension\\..description: Settings for a MarkEdit extension. Shape is defined by the extension itself.

key.description: Printable characters use uppercase form (e.g. "M", "="). Non-printable use names like "Tab", "Return", "F1".

modifiers.description: Modifier keys; order does not matter.

customToolbarItem.description: Custom toolbar item. Provide menuName and/or actionName.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

editor.autoCharacterPairs.description: Whether to automatically wrap selections with characters like [], **, etc. Default: true.

editor.autoSaveWhenIdle.description: Save changes automatically after stopping typing for a while. Forced off when editor.closeAlwaysConfirmsChanges is true. Default: false.

editor.closeAlwaysConfirmsChanges.description: MarkEdit-only equivalent of "Ask to keep changes when closing documents".

editor.restoreLastSelection.description: Restore the selection range from the previous edit session. Default: true.

editor.indentBehavior.description: Whether to indent paragraphs or lines. Default: never.

editor.writingToolsBehavior.description: macOS Sequoia+ Writing Tools behavior. Unknown values are ignored.

editor.visibleWhitespaceCharacter.description: Character used to render whitespace when Render Invisibles is enabled. Empty string hides them.

editor.visibleLineBreakCharacter.description: Character used to render line breaks when Render Invisibles is enabled. Empty string hides them.

editor.searchNormalizers.description: Map of regex pattern -> replacement string applied to search queries.

editor.nativeSearchQuerySync.description: Sync the search query from native apps (e.g. TextEdit). Default: false.

general.useClassicInterface.description: macOS Tahoe: revert to classic aesthetics instead of Liquid Glass. Default: false.

general.visualEffectType.description: macOS Tahoe: visual effect for some UI components. Default: glass.

general.updateBehavior.description: Behavior for presenting new app versions. Default: quiet.

general.checksForUpdates.description: Deprecated. Use general.updateBehavior instead. When false, forces updateBehavior to never.

general.disableOpenPanelOptions.description: Disable options in the file open panel. Default: true on macOS 26+, otherwise false.

general.disableCorsRestrictions.description: Disable CORS restrictions for the Fetch API. Default: false.

general.disabledWebKitFeatures.description: Additional WKPreferences feature keys to disable at WebContent process startup, on top of the always-disabled built-in set. Example: ["NotificationsEnabled", "PushAPIEnabled"]. Default: [].

general.preferredTerminalApp.description: Bundle identifier of the preferred terminal app for Pandoc (e.g. "com.apple.Terminal").

general.mainWindowHotKey.description: Global hotkey to toggle main window visibility.
